title: Executive Order 13512—Amending Executive Order 13390
text:
By the authority vested in me as President by the Constitution and the laws of the United States of America, including the Robert T. Stafford Disaster Relief and Emergency Assistance Act, as amended (42 U.S.C. 5121
et seq
.), and in order to extend the work of the Coordinator of Federal Support for the Recovery and Rebuilding of the Gulf Coast Region, Executive Order 13390 of November 1, 2005, as amended, is further amended by striking "September 30, 2009," and inserting in lieu thereof "April 1, 2010."
BARACK OBAMA
The White House,
September 29, 2009.
